name: Juggernaut
flavor: The offense discipline: a Sandow who never stops moving forward, turning every hit, shove, and thrown body into fuel for the next, bigger swing.

features.name: Unstoppable Force
features.description: You feed on the wreckage you cause. In addition to your baseline Grit generation, you gain 1 additional Grit the first time each turn you deal damage to a creature with a Heave throw, and you gain 1 Grit the first time each turn you knock a creature prone by some means OTHER than a Heave (a shove, Bulldozer Charge, Earthshaker, and the like) — two separate sources, each capped at once per turn, exactly like your baseline Grit generation. A Heave already pays out through the first source, so the prone it also causes never grants a second Grit off the same throw. The bigger the mess you make, the more you have left to make it worse.

features.name: Bulldozer Charge
features.description: When you move at least 15 feet in a straight line toward a creature and then hit it with a melee weapon attack before the end of the same turn, the attack deals an extra [[1d6]] bludgeoning damage, and the target must succeed on a Strength saving throw against your {{save DC|8 + proficiency bonus + Strength modifier}} or be knocked prone and pushed 5 feet directly away from you, your choice of direction. You can use Bulldozer Charge only once per turn.

features.name: Through, Not Around
features.description: Doors are a suggestion and walls are a delay. You have advantage on Strength checks made to break, force, or topple objects and barriers, and your attacks deal double damage to objects and structures. Given a minute of uninterrupted battering, you can break through any nonmagical door, palisade, or barricade that a creature of your size could conceivably breach — the only question the table needs to answer is how much noise you make doing it.
features.sheetSummary: Advantage on Strength checks to break/force objects and barriers; double damage vs objects and structures. Given 1 minute, breach any breachable nonmagical door or barricade.
